About Autoglow

We're a Malawian-owned, registered cleaning company built on professionalism, trust, and a passion for immaculate spaces.

Our Story

Born in Blantyre, Built for Malawi

Autoglow Cleaning Services Limited was founded with a clear mission: to bring world-class cleaning standards to Malawi's homes, businesses, and institutions.

Incorporated as a Private Limited Company under the Companies Act No. 15 of 2013 (Company No. COY-VWU7N7J), we are a fully registered, tax-compliant business operating from Sunnyside, Blantyre.

From a single contract to a growing portfolio of clients including schools, healthcare facilities, and corporates — Autoglow has grown quickly because we never cut corners.

2026
Incorporated
5+
Active Contracts
11
Service Types
Registered & Compliant
TIN: 71173084 · TPIN verified

What Drives Us

Mission, Vision & Values

Our Mission

Spotless Spaces for Every Malawian

To provide accessible, high-quality cleaning and facility maintenance services that improve the health, hygiene, and appearance of every space we touch — residential or commercial.

Our Vision

The Most Trusted Name in Cleaning

To become Malawi's most trusted and recognisable facility maintenance brand — expanding across all regions and setting the benchmark for cleaning standards.

Core Values

What We Stand For

  • ✓ Integrity & Transparency
  • ✓ Professionalism
  • ✓ Eco-Conscious Practice
  • ✓ Client First Always
  • ✓ Continuous Improvement

The Autoglow Way

How We Do Things Differently

Vetted & Trained Staff
Every team member undergoes professional training and background vetting before serving any client.
On-Time, Every Time
Punctuality is non-negotiable. We respect your time and schedule every clean with precision.
Eco-Friendly Products
Biodegradable, non-toxic cleaning agents — safe for children, pets, and the environment.
Satisfaction Guaranteed
Not happy? We come back — no questions, no extra charge. Your satisfaction is our guarantee.

Our People

Leadership Team

PS
Prince Saka
Founder & Managing Director

Visionary founder with a passion for service excellence. Leads strategy, business development, and client relations.

Daudi Symon
Operations Manager

IT-trained operations professional overseeing scheduling, client communications, systems, and day-to-day management.

Chisomo Saka
Finance & Administration

Manages financial operations, invoicing, procurement, and administrative functions with precision and diligence.
